channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Many Seniors Return to Work Through Gig Jobs Due to Financial Needs
item.description: A growing number of older Americans are returning to the workforce after having retired, a trend known as 'unretiring.' Rising living costs, inadequate retirement savings, and a desire to remain activ...

item.title: Omar Aqil Transforms Digital Overload into Playful Self-Portraits
item.description: Pakistani designer Omar Aqil has created a series of self-portraits that reinterpret the concept of identity through a mix of digital clutter and creative composition. Instead of traditional portraits...

item.title: US Fighter Jets Downed Over Iran Challenge Claims of Air Superiority
item.description: The recent downing of two U.S. fighter jets over Iran marks a significant development in an already unpopular conflict. While one crew member has been rescued and treated, the status of the other rema...

item.title: Artemis II Begins Journey Toward Moon After Earth Orbit Departure
item.description: The Artemis II mission has successfully left Earth's orbit and begun its four-day journey to the moon. Astronauts Reid Wiseman, Victor Glover, Christina Koch, and Jeremy Hansen are aboard the Orion sp...

item.title: US and Israeli Forces Conduct Search for Downed F-15 Pilot Over Iran
item.description: An American F-15 fighter jet was shot down over Iranian territory, prompting a joint search-and-rescue operation by U.S. and Israeli forces for one missing crew member. This incident marks the first t...

item.title: Electoral Act 2026 gives INEC more powers and restricts court interference in political party matters
item.description: Section 83 of the Electoral Act 2026 don clearly give Independent National Electoral Commission (INEC) stronger power to monitor all registered political parties for proper compliance with the law. Th...

item.title: Marks & Spencer urges authorities to tackle rising retail crime and violence against staff
item.description: Marks & Spencer (M&S) has raised serious concerns over the increase in retail crime and the abuse of its staff, citing incidents ranging from shoplifting to violent attacks. Retail director Thinus Kee...

item.title: Pam Bondi Removed as Attorney General Amid Epstein File Controversy
item.description: Pam Bondi, the U.S. Attorney General, was reportedly dismissed by President Donald Trump following a meeting in the Oval Office just before his national address on the war in Iran. According to source...

item.title: Rob Kauffman to Step Down from NASCAR Following Charter System Controversies
item.description: Rob Kauffman, a long-time figure behind the scenes in NASCAR, is preparing to resign from his executive role after decades of involvement in the sport. Kauffman played a pivotal role in the developmen...

item.title: Ravikant Kisana Reflects on Caste, Privilege, and Modern India
item.description: Ravikant Kisana, an academic and writer, shares insights from his book 'Meet the Savarnas', which explores the complex dynamics of caste, privilege, and society in modern India. Coming from an interca...

item.title: Ontario man receives sentence for 2023 Collingwood stabbing incident
item.description: In April 2026, a man from Ontario was sentenced to time already served following his conviction for manslaughter in connection with a stabbing that occurred in Collingwood in 2023. The incident had dr...

item.title: US Army Chief Resigns During West Asia Conflict, Iran Bridge Targeted by Air Strike
item.description: In recent developments from West Asia, five Indians were among twelve people injured in Abu Dhabi after debris fell in the Ajban area due to a missile intercepted by air defence systems. Six Nepali na...

item.title: Top Energy Officials Arrested as Probe into Substandard Fuel Imports Intensifies
item.description: Kenya has seen a major shake-up in the energy sector as four top government officials, including Petroleum PS Mohamed Liban, EPRA Director General Daniel Kiptoo, and Kenya Pipeline Company MD Joe Sang...

item.title: Toronto Shen Yun Performances Cancelled After Threats Deemed Non-Credible
item.description: Organisers of the Shen Yun performing arts show in Toronto reported that a series of threats, which police assessed as non-credible, led to the cancellation of performances scheduled for April 1-5. Th...

item.title: Bill C-22 proposes new requirements for companies to assist police and CSIS in accessing digital data
item.description: The Liberal government has introduced Bill C-22, its second attempt to give law enforcement and intelligence agencies easier access to Canadians' digital information. Section 15 of the bill would requ...

item.title: Teen survives SUV fire in Eastern Cape crash that claims three lives
item.description: In the early hours of Good Friday, a tragic head-on collision on the R67 between Seymour and Whittlesea in the Eastern Cape claimed three lives. The crash involved a sport utility vehicle (SUV) and a ...

item.title: Artemis II Astronaut Resolves Toilet Malfunction During Mission
item.description: During the first day of NASA's Artemis II mission, the spacecraft experienced a malfunction with its $30 million Universal Waste Management System (UWMS) due to an issue with the toilet fan. The crew,...

item.title: Quebec's Secularism Law May Restrict Public Good Friday Religious Processions
item.description: Christians across Quebec are facing new restrictions on public religious events following the recent passage of a provincial secularism law. The legislation, adopted on Thursday, expands the existing ...

item.title: Megan Thee Stallion Takes a Day to Rest After Feeling Unwell on Stage
item.description: American rapper Megan Thee Stallion recently worried fans when she almost collapsed during a live performance in New York. She was rushed to hospital, prompting friends and her hairstylist to ask foll...

item.title: Laura Benanti humorously overlooked by theater teens during flight
item.description: Tony Award-winning actress Laura Benanti experienced a humorous and slightly humbling moment during a recent flight. Surrounded by a group of theater-loving teenagers, Benanti realized that despite he...
